creator: saper@saper.info
text:
- Update to 1.1.3

This is necessary to avoid compatibility problems with docutils 0.9,
such as issue #889 Reporter instance has no attribute 'locator'.

# Python version: 2.7.1
# Docutils version: 0.9 release
# Jinja2 version: 2.6
